sections.name: Footer

page.reasoning: minimal variant for conversion-focused pages — strip nav_links, keep logo and single CTA only. Decision-stage trial users converting to paid require reduced cognitive load and a single, persistent conversion action.

Explorer variant uses 2-col-heavy with longer copy per feature. This archetype benefits from detailed outcome-oriented descriptions that support exploration and deeper engagement during the decision stage.

slots.headline: Everything you explored — now fully unlocked
slots.subhead: Your trial gave you a glimpse. Here's what becomes available the moment you upgrade to a paid plan.

features.title: Adaptive Component Library
features.description: Access the full library of intent-aware components that respond to user context in real time. Build interfaces that feel considered rather than generic, without writing conditional logic by hand.

features.title: Usage & Behaviour Analytics
features.description: Understand how users move through your product with built-in behavioural telemetry. Identify drop-off points, track engagement by mode, and make design decisions grounded in real data.

features.title: Instant Token Sync
features.description: Push design token changes across every surface simultaneously, with zero rebuild cycles. Teams report shipping visual updates 2.3x faster after switching from manual token workflows.

features.title: Role-Based Access Control
features.description: Invite your entire team with confidence. Granular permissions let you control exactly who can view, edit, or publish — keeping production environments stable as your team scales.

features.title: Unlimited Project Workspaces
features.description: Organise work across clients, products, or squads without hitting artificial limits. Each workspace maintains its own token sets, component overrides, and version history independently.

features.title: Priority Support & Onboarding
features.description: Paid customers get direct access to the MODE support team with median first-response times under 9 minutes. New accounts also receive a dedicated onboarding session to get your system production-ready faster.

page.reasoning: with-cta variant recaptures departing users on key conversion pages — use on pricing and signup flows. Trial-to-paid conversion warrants recovery CTAs to prevent drop-off at page close.
